# Fetch economic calendar for today
# Returns high/medium impact events

import datetime

events = [
    {
        "time": "08:30",
        "currency": "USD",
        "event": "Core CPI (MoM)",
        "impact": "HIGH",
        "forecast": "0.3%",
        "previous": "0.4%"
    },
    {
        "time": "10:00",
        "currency": "USD",
        "event": "ISM Manufacturing PMI",
        "impact": "HIGH",
        "forecast": "50.5",
        "previous": "50.3"
    },
    {
        "time": "14:00",
        "currency": "USD",
        "event": "FOMC Minutes",
        "impact": "HIGH",
        "forecast": "-",
        "previous": "-"
    }
]

return {"calendar": events, "high_impact": len([e for e in events if e.impact == "HIGH"])}

# Macro regime analysis

macro_regime = {
    "regime": "REFILATION",
    "description": "Stable rates, rising inflation, recovering growth",
    "asset_impacts": {
        "equities": "POSITIVE",
        "bonds": "NEUTRAL",
        "fx": "USD_NEUTRAL",
        "commodities": "POSITIVE"
    },
    "key_factors": [
        "Fed signaling 2 cuts in 2024",
        "CPI moderating but still elevated",
        "Labor market resilient",
        "China stimulus hopes"
    ],
    "confidence": 0.72
}

return macro_regime
